title: しっとりパーティータイム

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way to another training session with
Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, Suzukaaa! Howdy dooo? I found you!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ka-thoomp!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wah!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Golly, am I happy I ran into you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle dashes towards Silence Suzuka and
gives her a great, big hug!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! Sorry, pardner! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I-it's okay. Was there... something you needed?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oopsie! I almost forgot! I wanna throw a party!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: A party?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yessiree! My folks just sent me some big ol' juicy
steaks!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I say we eat it together and wash it down with
some nice, fresh milk! Hehe! Now, don't that
sound fun?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm grateful for the invitation, but... I'm not really
good with big groups.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That ain't no problem! We can have a party with
just the two of us! You and me!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Now, you know I love gatherin' a buncha folks
round for a big party!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But you're my special guest today! A nice, quiet
time with you is A-OK with me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So long as my guest is happy, I'm happy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, if you say so...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Taiki. Um... would one more guest be
okay?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I'm good with whoever you wanna
invite!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? What do you think? Do you want to join
us?
choice_data_list: We should get in a good workout before eating.
We should get in a good workout before eating.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? What do you think? Do you want to join
us?
choice_data_list: We should get in a good workout before eating.
We should get in a good workout before eating.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
All right. I'm looking forward to trying a real
American-style meal.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yippee! I hope you're good 'n hungry!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Cause the pile of steaks is as high as the Rocky
Mountains!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I don't know if I can eat that much.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All right, then! Time to get cookin'!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: W-wait a minute! Taiki!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over the course of the party, the three of us
somehow manage to finish every bite of Taiki's
mountain of steaks.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're quite right.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Taiki, would you mind if I work up an appetite
first?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! Better yet, why don't I join you?
We're gonna be starvin' after this!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And whaddaya say we make it interesting?
Winner gets to eat all the steak they want! Buffet
style!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I don't know about a buffet, but a race
does sound fun.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: On your marks! Get set!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After working up an appetite, both racers regain
their stamina by devouring plenty of steak.
